signals.raw: **Trump's Role**: President Trump announced a US Navy blockade of Iranian ports and the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday (April 13), warning of a "quick and brutal" response to Iranian ships; he stated Iran contacted the US this morning seeking a deal, but no nuclear concessions will be made[3].

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO** | **MED** confidence[1][3]

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, below market forecasts of 2.4% and up slightly from prior months while aligning near the Bank of Korea's 2% target[1][3]. signals.raw: **Key Developments**: The US and Iran are planning a second round of negotiations this week in Islamabad before the two-week ceasefire—announced April 7—expires early next week; weekend talks ended without a deal[1][3].
